{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Administrative Officer",
  "description": "At Lariken Nursery and Primary School, we raise confident learners and future leaders through a rich blend of academic excellence, moral discipline, and creative innovation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Ensure smooth day-to-day running of the office operations
	Prepare, update, and manage official records and correspondence
	Ensure submission of reports and documentation
	Schedule and coordinate meetings, appointments, and evets.
	Assist with staff attendance records
	Maintain updated staff &amp; student files.


Requirements


	Must possess at least a B.Sc., B.Ed., or HND, in Business Administration, Mass Communication, Marketing or other related fields from reputable institutions
	Must possess at least 2 years of cognate experience working as an administrator/ marketer.
	Meticulous attention to detail with superb organizational skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Salary
N90,000 - N100,000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;larikenprimarys@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-09",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-10",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Lariken Nursery and Primary School"
    
  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

    "value": "197181"
  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 75000,
      "maxValue": 150000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Administrative Officer Job at Lariken Nursery and Primary School




        
    

        
        At Lariken Nursery and Primary School, we raise confident learners and future leaders through a rich blend of academic excellence, moral discipline, and creative innovation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Ensure smooth day-to-day running of the office operations
	Prepare, update, and manage official records and correspondence
	Ensure submission of reports and documentation
	Schedule and coordinate meetings, appointments, and evets.
	Assist with staff attendance records
	Maintain updated staff & student files.


Requirements


	Must possess at least a B.Sc., B.Ed., or HND, in Business Administration, Mass Communication, Marketing or other related fields from reputable institutions
	Must possess at least 2 years of cognate experience working as an administrator/ marketer.
	Meticulous attention to detail with superb organizational skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Salary
N90,000 - N100,000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Customer Success Manager, Fintech",
  "description": "Optasia is a fully-integrated B2B2X financial technology platform covering scoring, financial decisioning, disbursement &amp; collection. We provide a versatile AI Platform powering financial inclusion, delivering responsible financing decision-making and driving a superior business model &amp; strong customer experience. Since company&rsquo;s inception, over a decade ago, we have grown to become a global leader in the Fintech fields, constantly expanding and adding new solutions, offerings, and untapped monetization opportunities for all our partners and clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Senior Customer Success Manager, Fintech

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type:&nbsp;Full Time

Job&nbsp;Description


	We are seeking a highly experienced and commercially minded professional with deep telecoms expertise and strong fintech acumen to lead and expand strategic relationships with our mobile operator partners.
	As a Senior Customer Success Manager, you will act as a trusted advisor to the Senior VP Commercial, at both operational and executive levels, owning the success, growth, and long-term value of your designated account(s).
	You will represent Optasia&#39;s full portfolio of AI-powered lending and credit scoring solutions, drive cross-selling and expansion opportunities, and ensure consistent delivery of business outcomes aligned with our partners&#39; fintech and telecom strategies.


What You Will Do


	Lead the success, retention, and growth of a portfolio of strategic customer accounts, with accountability for customer outcomes, value realization, and long-term partnerships.
	Act as a trusted senior advisor to customer stakeholders as primary point of contact executing day-to-day commercial activities, including executive-level contacts, leading strategic reviews and success planning.
	Define and drive customer success strategies aligned to customer business objectives, contractual commitments, and organizational goals.
	Own customer health, performance metrics, and SLA outcomes; proactively manage risks, escalations, and complex issues to resolution.
	Identify and drive expansion, renewal, and optimization opportunities, partnering closely with sales, account management, and leadership teams.
	Support cross-functional collaboration across operations, product, finance, and service teams to ensure high-quality delivery and continuous improvement.
	Mentor and support Customer Success Managers and Account Managers, providing guidance on account strategy, performance management, and best practices.
	Deliver executive-level reporting, insights, and recommendations on account performance, risks, and growth opportunities.
	Contribute to customer success strategy, process design, and service model evolution to improve retention, customer satisfaction, and revenue outcomes.


Leadership:


	Lead, develop, and mentor a high-performing team of Account Managers and Customer Success Managers, setting clear performance expectations and standards.
	Act as a point of escalation and guidance for complex customer, commercial, and delivery challenges, ensuring timely and effective resolution.
	Drive knowledge sharing, best practices, and consistent ways of working across the team to strengthen execution quality and scalability.
	Provide regular coaching, feedback, and performance reviews, supporting professional development and readiness for increased responsibility.
	Foster a collaborative, accountable, and results-driven team culture aligned with Optasia&#39;s commercial and customer success objectives


What You Will Bring
Essential Qualifications &amp; Experience:


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree
	Minimum of 8 years of proven experience in B2B Account Management, preferably within the Telecoms or Fintech industry.
	Minimum 4yrs Telecoms industry experience
	Strong understanding of the cultural, political, and regulatory landscape in the assigned market(s).


Preferred:


	Experience in Telecoms Customer Value Management (CVM), Value-Added Services (VAS), and/or fintech and digital financial services solutions.
	Proven success in driving upselling and cross-selling initiatives within enterprise accounts.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-09",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-10",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Optasia"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "197180"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",

      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Senior Customer Success Manager, Fintech Job at Optasia




        
    

        
        Optasia is a fully-integrated B2B2X financial technology platform covering scoring, financial decisioning, disbursement & collection. We provide a versatile AI Platform powering financial inclusion, delivering responsible financing decision-making and driving a superior business model & strong customer experience. Since company’s inception, over a decade ago, we have grown to become a global leader in the Fintech fields, constantly expanding and adding new solutions, offerings, and untapped monetization opportunities for all our partners and clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Customer Success Manager, Fintech
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full Time

Job Description


	We are seeking a highly experienced and commercially minded professional with deep telecoms expertise and strong fintech acumen to lead and expand strategic relationships with our mobile operator partners.
	As a Senior Customer Success Manager, you will act as a trusted advisor to the Senior VP Commercial, at both operational and executive levels, owning the success, growth, and long-term value of your designated account(s).
	You will represent Optasia's full portfolio of AI-powered lending and credit scoring solutions, drive cross-selling and expansion opportunities, and ensure consistent delivery of business outcomes aligned with our partners' fintech and telecom strategies.


What You Will Do


	Lead the success, retention, and growth of a portfolio of strategic customer accounts, with accountability for customer outcomes, value realization, and long-term partnerships.
	Act as a trusted senior advisor to customer stakeholders as primary point of contact executing day-to-day commercial activities, including executive-level contacts, leading strategic reviews and success planning.
	Define and drive customer success strategies aligned to customer business objectives, contractual commitments, and organizational goals.
	Own customer health, performance metrics, and SLA outcomes; proactively manage risks, escalations, and complex issues to resolution.
	Identify and drive expansion, renewal, and optimization opportunities, partnering closely with sales, account management, and leadership teams.
	Support cross-functional collaboration across operations, product, finance, and service teams to ensure high-quality delivery and continuous improvement.
	Mentor and support Customer Success Managers and Account Managers, providing guidance on account strategy, performance management, and best practices.
	Deliver executive-level reporting, insights, and recommendations on account performance, risks, and growth opportunities.
	Contribute to customer success strategy, process design, and service model evolution to improve retention, customer satisfaction, and revenue outcomes.


Leadership:


	Lead, develop, and mentor a high-performing team of Account Managers and Customer Success Managers, setting clear performance expectations and standards.
	Act as a point of escalation and guidance for complex customer, commercial, and delivery challenges, ensuring timely and effective resolution.
	Drive knowledge sharing, best practices, and consistent ways of working across the team to strengthen execution quality and scalability.
	Provide regular coaching, feedback, and performance reviews, supporting professional development and readiness for increased responsibility.
	Foster a collaborative, accountable, and results-driven team culture aligned with Optasia's commercial and customer success objectives


What You Will Bring
Essential Qualifications & Experience:


	Bachelor's Degree
	Minimum of 8 years of proven experience in B2B Account Management, preferably within the Telecoms or Fintech industry.
	Minimum 4yrs Telecoms industry experience
	Strong understanding of the cultural, political, and regulatory landscape in the assigned market(s).


Preferred:


	Experience in Telecoms Customer Value Management (CVM), Value-Added Services (VAS), and/or fintech and digital financial services solutions.
	Proven success in driving upselling and cross-selling initiatives within enterprise accounts.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

Customer Relationship Executive (BPE) Job at Simon Page College of Marketing




        
    

        
        Simon Page College of Marketing is a modern and dynamic training institution committed to the provision of quality qualifications and training for professional and academic development across Africa. We currently operate in 3 countries (Nigeria, Ghana and Kenya) offering the CIM UK, CIPR UK, DMI Ireland and PMP qualifications.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Relationship Executive (BPE)

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop and execute sales plans to meet enrolment targets for the assigned qualifications.
	Ensure that lecture events are well prepared for and run smoothly.
	Promptly respond to students’ complaints and enquiries professionally, efficiently, and effectively.
	Build strong relationships with the students while representing and communicating the Simon Page brand values.
	Consistently improve students’ learning experience by providing adequate support and close follow-up/show of interest in their study progression.
	Ensure seamless continuity of students’ study within programs and cross-selling other programs to them.
	Contribute to the development of new programs within the Simon Page portfolio.
	Contribute to and participate in team bonding activities.
	Support the fostering of a conducive working environment and improved productivity.
	Research and keep updated on the needs of the customers/students as well as the competition.
	Engage in personal development activities and participate in weekly in-house training.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Strategy Manager",
  "description": "Global Linkers Limited - We are forward-thinking HR consulting firm dedicated to partnering with upcoming and medium-scale businesses to strengthen their people practices and achieve sustainable growth. We provide practical, cost-efficient HR solutions that streamline operations, enhance workforce capability, and allow business leaders to stay focused on their core priorities. By reducing administrative burden and improving productivity, we support organizations in unlocking their full potential with confidence and professionalism We partner with organizations to design and implement practical HR systems that strengthen people management, improve productivity, and support long-term business growth. Our approach focuses on providing cost-effective and structured HR solutions that reduce administrative burdens while enabling leadership to remain focused on strategic priorities and organizational impact. At Global Linkers Ltd, we understand that people are the most valuable asset of every organization. We therefore work closely with our clients to develop HR frameworks that promote operational efficiency, enhance employee capability, and foster a productive and compliant work environment. Through our integrated HR services, we help organizations establish strong people management practices, streamline workforce operations, and create a scalable foundation that supports sustainable growth.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Posiiton: Business Strategy Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	We are in search for a Business Strategy Manager will play a key role in supporting the development and execution of our group&#39;s strategic vision, ensuring alignment with overall business objectives.
	You&#39;ll work closely with senior leadership and coordinate with other management teams to drive strategic initiatives, analyze business performance, and identify opportunities for growth and improvement.


Key Responsibilities


	Support development and execution of group-level strategic plans
	Analyze business performance, identify areas for improvement, and drive corrective actions
	Conduct business case analysis and provide strategic recommendations to the Board
	Drive strategic initiatives and special projects, ensuring alignment with business objectives
	Collaborate with business units and coordinate with other management teams to identify opportunities for growth and synergy
	Monitor industry trends, competitor activity, and market developments
	Provide strategic support to the Board and senior leadership
	Facilitate cross-functional collaboration to deliver strategic business objectives
	Prepare periodic and strategic board level reports.


Requirements


	MBA or equivalent experience preferred.
	Minimum 5 years of experience in strategic planning, business analysis, or related field
	Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills
	Experience in business case development and strategic planning
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;apply@globallinkersltd.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Buisness Strategy Manager &ldquo;&nbsp;as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-25",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

Business Strategy Manager Job at Global Linkers Limited




        
    

        
        
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    

Global Linkers Limited - We are forward-thinking HR consulting firm dedicated to partnering with upcoming and medium-scale businesses to strengthen their people practices and achieve sustainable growth. We provide practical, cost-efficient HR solutions that streamline operations, enhance workforce capability, and allow business leaders to stay focused on their core priorities. By reducing administrative burden and improving productivity, we support organizations in unlocking their full potential with confidence and professionalism We partner with organizations to design and implement practical HR systems that strengthen people management, improve productivity, and support long-term business growth. Our approach focuses on providing cost-effective and structured HR solutions that reduce administrative burdens while enabling leadership to remain focused on strategic priorities and organizational impact. At Global Linkers Ltd, we understand that people are the most valuable asset of every organization. We therefore work closely with our clients to develop HR frameworks that promote operational efficiency, enhance employee capability, and foster a productive and compliant work environment. Through our integrated HR services, we help organizations establish strong people management practices, streamline workforce operations, and create a scalable foundation that supports sustainable growth.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Posiiton: Business Strategy Manager

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	We are in search for a Business Strategy Manager will play a key role in supporting the development and execution of our group's strategic vision, ensuring alignment with overall business objectives.
	You'll work closely with senior leadership and coordinate with other management teams to drive strategic initiatives, analyze business performance, and identify opportunities for growth and improvement.


Key Responsibilities


	Support development and execution of group-level strategic plans
	Analyze business performance, identify areas for improvement, and drive corrective actions
	Conduct business case analysis and provide strategic recommendations to the Board
	Drive strategic initiatives and special projects, ensuring alignment with business objectives
	Collaborate with business units and coordinate with other management teams to identify opportunities for growth and synergy
	Monitor industry trends, competitor activity, and market developments
	Provide strategic support to the Board and senior leadership
	Facilitate cross-functional collaboration to deliver strategic business objectives
	Prepare periodic and strategic board level reports.


Requirements


	MBA or equivalent experience preferred.
	Minimum 5 years of experience in strategic planning, business analysis, or related field
	Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills
	Experience in business case development and strategic planning
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Buisness Strategy Manager “ as the subject of the    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing Manager",
  "description": "Sunrose Consulting Limited -&nbsp;Our client is a chain of value fashion and home stores in Nigeria. It is a refreshing concept in today&#39;s retail scenario and part of an International group which, being one of the oldest &amp; foremost retail houses, has achieved important milestones in retail, fashion and lifestyle over the last three decades. With its vision to be the preferred Value Retail Brand for Fashion and Home ware, it has made its mark in a competitive world becoming a favorite of families that look forward to the latest in fashion and style along with a truly enjoyable shopping experience. The company is now looking for an outstanding individual with passion, commitment and creativity to deliver the company&rsquo;s promise of Value.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	Reporting to the Managing Director, you will oversee the execution of marketing and brand initiatives across all the business locations in Nigeria.
	Working closely with the Head of Strategy, you will translate brand strategy into coordinated campaigns, retail activations, and partnerships that strengthen brand visibility and drive store performance.
	This role will act as the&nbsp;central point of coordination, ensuring campaigns, promotions, and brand initiatives are executed consistently across all stores, digital platforms, and marketing channels.


Key Responsibilities
Campaign Execution &amp; Brand Rollout:


	Execute brand campaigns and marketing initiatives.
	Coordinate campaign rollouts across all retail locations and digital channels.
	Ensure marketing materials, promotions, and brand messaging are consistent across stores.
	Manage timelines and delivery for campaign assets including in-store displays, digital content, and promotional materials.


Multi-Location Retail Coordination:


	Oversee the implementation of marketing initiatives in all store locations.
	Work closely with store managers to ensure campaigns and promotions are properly executed in-store.
	Coordinate distribution of marketing assets, POS materials, and campaign guidelines across locations.
	Monitor store-level campaign performance and customer response.


Partnerships &amp; Collaboration Opportunities:


	Identify opportunities for brand collaborations, influencer partnerships, and cultural activations.
	Support the development of partnerships that increase brand visibility and attract new audiences.
	Coordinate collaborative campaigns and ensure they align with overall brand strategy.


Retail Activations &amp; Customer Engagement:


	Plan and oversee in-store events, activations, and promotional moments that drive customer engagement.
	Work with the retail team to improve the in-store brand experience.
	Identify opportunities to increase store traffic through creative retail marketing initiatives.


Content &amp; Marketing Coordination:


	Work with internal teams and external partners to develop campaign content and marketing assets.
	Coordinate social media marketing, influencer activations, and promotional communications.
	Ensure brand tone and visual identity remain consistent across all platforms.


Performance Monitoring &amp; Reporting:


	Track the performance of marketing campaigns and retail promotions.
	Collect insights from store teams and customer feedback to refine future campaigns.
	Provide regular updates to the Head of Strategy on campaign execution and results.


Key Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree
	3+ years of experience in brand management, retail marketing, or fashion marketing.
	Experience managing multi-location retail marketing campaigns.
	Strong project management and coordination skills.
	Ability to manage multiple campaigns and stakeholders simultaneously.
	Strong understanding of fashion retail trends and consumer behaviour.


Preferred Skills:


	Experience in fashion retail or lifestyle brands.
	Experience coordinating in-store marketing across multiple locations.
	Strong relationships within the fashion, media, or creative industries.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Marketing Manager Job at Sunrose Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        Sunrose Consulting Limited - Our client is a chain of value fashion and home stores in Nigeria. It is a refreshing concept in today's retail scenario and part of an International group which, being one of the oldest & foremost retail houses, has achieved important milestones in retail, fashion and lifestyle over the last three decades. With its vision to be the preferred Value Retail Brand for Fashion and Home ware, it has made its mark in a competitive world becoming a favorite of families that look forward to the latest in fashion and style along with a truly enjoyable shopping experience. The company is now looking for an outstanding individual with passion, commitment and creativity to deliver the company’s promise of Value.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	Reporting to the Managing Director, you will oversee the execution of marketing and brand initiatives across all the business locations in Nigeria.
	Working closely with the Head of Strategy, you will translate brand strategy into coordinated campaigns, retail activations, and partnerships that strengthen brand visibility and drive store performance.
	This role will act as the central point of coordination, ensuring campaigns, promotions, and brand initiatives are executed consistently across all stores, digital platforms, and marketing channels.


Key Responsibilities
Campaign Execution & Brand Rollout:


	Execute brand campaigns and marketing initiatives.
	Coordinate campaign rollouts across all retail locations and digital channels.
	Ensure marketing materials, promotions, and brand messaging are consistent across stores.
	Manage timelines and delivery for campaign assets including in-store displays, digital content, and promotional materials.


Multi-Location Retail Coordination:


	Oversee the implementation of marketing initiatives in all store locations.
	Work closely with store managers to ensure campaigns and promotions are properly executed in-store.
	Coordinate distribution of marketing assets, POS materials, and campaign guidelines across locations.
	Monitor store-level campaign performance and customer response.


Partnerships & Collaboration Opportunities:


	Identify opportunities for brand collaborations, influencer partnerships, and cultural activations.
	Support the development of partnerships that increase brand visibility and attract new audiences.
	Coordinate collaborative campaigns and ensure they align with overall brand strategy.


Retail Activations & Customer Engagement:


	Plan and oversee in-store events, activations, and promotional moments that drive customer engagement.
	Work with the retail team to improve the in-store brand experience.
	Identify opportunities to increase store traffic through creative retail marketing initiatives.


Content & Marketing Coordination:


	Work with internal teams and external partners to develop campaign content and marketing assets.
	Coordinate social media marketing, influencer activations, and promotional communications.
	Ensure brand tone and visual identity remain consistent across all platforms.


Performance Monitoring & Reporting:


	Track the performance of marketing campaigns and retail promotions.
	Collect insights from store teams and customer feedback to refine future campaigns.
	Provide regular updates to the Head of Strategy on campaign execution and results.


Key Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor’s Degree
	3+ years of experience in brand management, retail marketing, or fashion marketing.
	Experience managing multi-location retail marketing campaigns.
	Strong project management and coordination skills.
	Ability to manage multiple campaigns and stakeholders simultaneously.
	Strong understanding of fashion retail trends and consumer behaviour.


Preferred Skills:


	Experience in fashion retail or lifestyle brands.
	Experience coordinating in-store marketing across multiple locations.
	Strong relationships within the fashion, media, or creative industries.
